title: Add default-on balanced curation to score dataset-curate
description:
## Summary
Add default-on balanced curation to `plexus score dataset-curate`.

## Purpose
Reduce class-skew in associated datasets while preserving practical dataset size.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `--max-items` is the final output cap.
- Balancing is enabled by default.
- `--no-balance` explicitly disables balancing.
- Selection/output are deterministic.
- Command output includes before/after class distribution summary fields.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented default-on balancing in score dataset-curate with explicit --no-balance opt-out. Changes: (1) curation path now supports full qualifying scan mode for balancing; (2) added deterministic balanced selector that round-robins champion-YAML class buckets and then fills remaining slots in source order to preserve final size up to --max-items; (3) result payload now includes balance_applied, class_list_used, and class_distribution_before/after; (4) CLI wired with --no-balance and balance pass-through. Added tests for balancing selector/distribution and CLI flag behavior. Verification: pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py plexus/cli/score/scores_dataset_curate_test.py tests/scores/test_score_validation.py -q => pass; py_compile on changed modules => pass.
